content.title: Marcus's Bathroom Routine  -  Bluey's Potty Steps

steps.icon_note: Bluey walking icon with arrow to bathroom door
Stick figure sitting on toilet icon
Toilet paper with adapted wipe holder icon
Flush handle with Bluey sticker star burst

steps.activity: Wash hands with warm water and soap (sing Bluey song)
steps.icon_note: Hands under running water with music notes

content.notes: Print on waterproof laminated card and mount at Marcus's eye level inside the bathroom stall. Each step has a velcro check-off square  -  Marcus moves a Bluey token down after each step. The Bluey sticker on the flush handle was the key to getting independent flushing. Use WARM water only for hand washing (cold triggers avoidance). The Bluey theme song takes about 40 seconds  -  perfect hand washing duration. OT recommended the adapted wipe holder for step 4; continue using until motor planning improves. Schedule bathroom trips at 9:00, 11:00, 1:00, and 2:30  -  use visual timer on AAC device as reminder. Do NOT use hand-over-hand prompting; use gestural or point prompts only.
